2026-06-16T10:27:44.3125355Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3125581Z [36;1m# Write gdb command file.[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3126087Z [36;1m# Uses Python event hooks so that:[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3126559Z [36;1m#   - on a fatal signal  → prints full backtrace and exits gdb with code 1[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3127142Z [36;1m#   - on a clean exit    → exits gdb with the inferior's own exit code[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3127764Z [36;1m# (Plain 'quit' in gdb --batch always exits 0, even after SIGSEGV with nopass.)[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3128345Z [36;1mGDB_CMD_FILE=$(mktemp /tmp/gdb_cmds.XXXXXX)[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3128756Z [36;1mcat > "$GDB_CMD_FILE" << 'GDBEOF'[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3129092Z [36;1mset pagination off[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3129379Z [36;1mset confirm off[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3129663Z [36;1mset print thread-events off[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3129977Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3130216Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3130490Z [36;1m_crash_signal = [None][0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3130809Z [36;1m_inf_exit_code = [0][0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3131125Z [36;1mdef _stop_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3131545Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'stop_signal') and event.stop_signal:[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3132025Z [36;1m        _crash_signal[0] = event.stop_signal[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3132408Z [36;1mdef _exit_handler(event):[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3132847Z [36;1m    if hasattr(event, 'exit_code') and event.exit_code is not None:[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3133336Z [36;1m        _inf_exit_code[0] = event.exit_code[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3133743Z [36;1mgdb.events.stop.connect(_stop_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3134181Z [36;1mgdb.events.exited.connect(_exit_handler)[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3134552Z [36;1mend[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3134827Z [36;1mhandle SIGSEGV stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3135203Z [36;1mhandle SIGABRT stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3135555Z [36;1mhandle SIGBUS  stop print nopass[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3136004Z [36;1mrun[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3136239Z [36;1mpython[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3136482Z [36;1mimport gdb[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3136781Z [36;1msig = _crash_signal[0][0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3137094Z [36;1mif sig:[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3137430Z [36;1m    print("\n\n========== GDB CRASH REPORT ==========")[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3137883Z [36;1m    print("Signal caught: " + str(sig))[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3138326Z [36;1m    print("--- Crashed thread backtrace (full) ---")[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3138749Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3139351Z [36;1m    print("\n--- All threads backtrace ---")[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3139763Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("thread apply all bt full")[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3140158Z [36;1m    print("=======================================")[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3140532Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit 1")[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3141037Z [36;1melse:[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3141300Z [36;1m    code = _inf_exit_code[0] or 0[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3141631Z [36;1m    gdb.execute("quit %d" % code)[0m
2026-06-16T10:27:44.3141939Z [36;1mend[0m
